Central request router and load balancer for all microservices. Routes incoming API requests to appropriate backend services, handles authentication validation via the auth-service, applies rate limit...
- **logging-service**: Audit logs for all authentication events
- **api-gateway-service**: On every request for JWT validation
- **user-service**: User profile lookup and account verification
- **cache-service**: Session token caching for fast validation (sub-ms response times)
- **logging-service**: Query logs and slow query tracking
- **monitoring-service**: Health checks and alerts during deployments
- **notification-service**: Sends API change notifications to subscribers
- **logging-service**: Email delivery logs and error tracking
- **monitoring-service**: Email queue depth and latency metrics
- **notification-service**: Sends low stock alerts to operations team
Integrates with warehouse management system via **deployment-service** webhooks for restock orders.
- **cache-service**: Real-time stock cache (updated on every inventory change; TTL: 30 seconds for freshness)
- **sms-service**: Handles SMS delivery and carrier routing
- **logging-service**: Delivery audit trail and error logs
- **email-service**: Handles email delivery and bounce tracking
- **notification-service**: Order confirmations, shipping updates, delivery notifications
- **cache-service**: Recent orders and in-flight order caching
- **search-service**: Full-text search for orders by ID, customer, product
Orders trigger fulfillment via **deployment-service** webhooks to warehouse systems.
- **database-service**: Transaction log persistence (immutable records for audits)
- **cache-service**: Distributed locks for idempotent payments; payment cache (5-minute TTL)
- **database-service**: Historical order and user data for model training
- **database-service**: Reads historical data for initial indexing
- **logging-service**: Search query logs and performance metrics
- **monitoring-service**: Queue depth and success rate tracking
- **database-service**: Persistent storage of user profiles and metadata
- **recommendation-service**: User history and preferences for recommendations
- **auth-service**: Validates user credentials during signup; used for permission checks
- **cache-service**: Caches active user profiles for fast lookup
- **notification-service**: Sends welcome emails on signup, password reset confirmations
- **search-service**: Indexes user profiles for discovery features
